inputs.text:
Create a single-canvas professional character reference board with the same structure as a clean wuxia costume design sheet.

REFERENCE USE:
Use the loaded reference image as identity / outfit / character reference conditioning. Preserve the same face structure, hairstyle, body proportion, clothing silhouette, main colors, material feeling, accessories, and temperament. The final board must be newly composed, not a simple enlargement or direct copy of the reference image.

CANVAS:
- 2560x1440 2K horizontal board, clean light gray background.
- Precise vertical editorial grid with white gutters and pale gray panels.
- Unequal columns, not five equal panels.
- Left 60%: three tall full-body columns for front, side, and back views.
- Middle-right 18%: a feature-detail column with a strict thumbnail grid.
- Far-right 22%: a large facial close-up panel above a color/material information area.

LAYOUT DETAILS:
1. First tall column: full-body front view, standing straight, centered, complete feet visible, neutral studio pose, arms relaxed naturally at the sides or holding a prop low in front of the body.
2. Second tall column: full-body strict side view, 90-degree profile, centered, complete feet visible, arms relaxed naturally, no raised-arm pose.
3. Third tall column: full-body back view, centered, complete feet visible, robe/back hair/back accessory details visible, arms relaxed naturally.
4. Feature column: a neat two-column grid of small rectangular thumbnails. Upper thumbnails show clean face-angle variations and hair/hat close-ups only; they must be head-and-shoulder crops with no hands, no arms, no fingers, no props, and no object touching the head or face. Lower thumbnails show sleeve, collar, robe fabric, belt, fan/weapon/prop, boots, and texture close-ups as isolated design details.
5. Far-right panel: one large head-and-shoulders facial close-up in the upper half; no hands near the face, no raised arms, no fingers touching hair, no hand on head. Lower half has clean blank rows, small color swatch rectangles, and empty label spaces for metadata.
6. Leave clean blank header bands at the top of each major column. Do not put text in the header bands; labels are added later by post-processing.

CONSISTENCY:
All views and thumbnails must be the same person. Keep identical facial structure, hair color, hairstyle, outfit silhouette, robe color, inner garment color, material texture, boots, and props across every module. Keep hands and arms anatomically normal and only where they belong in full-body views or prop-detail cells.

TEXT RULE:
Do not generate readable text, Chinese characters, English words, labels, numbers, fake letters, logos, or signatures. Only draw blank header areas, blank metadata rows, and abstract color swatches.

NEGATIVE INSTRUCTION:
No readable text, no fake letters, no random typography, no watermark, no logo, no signature. No extra people, no unrelated duplicate characters, no changed identity, no changed hairstyle, no changed outfit colors. No hand on head, no hand above head, no fingers touching hair, no fingers touching face, no hand covering face, no floating hands, no random arms in face thumbnails, no props crossing the face, no face fused with hands, no extra arms, no extra hands, no fused fingers, no extra fingers, no broken limbs. No cropped feet, no cut-off boots, no missing hands in full-body views. No noisy background, no movie poster, no action scene, no dramatic perspective, no fisheye lens.

STYLE:
High quality guofeng anime wuxia character design sheet, refined 2D illustration, clean confident line art, elegant cel shading, subtle fabric texture, soft studio lighting, calm costume-reference presentation. The board should feel like a polished anime character setting sheet inspired by professional costume-reference layout, with crisp rectangular panels and disciplined spacing.

STYLE AVOID:
Avoid photorealistic live-action skin, hyperreal photography, Unreal Engine render, western armor, modern fashion.

STYLE:
Realistic wuxia live-action character design sheet, high-end costume photography, neutral studio lighting, natural human skin texture, detailed fabric weave, believable robe layers, leather/metal/accessory details, clean production-design reference board. The board should feel like a professional casting/costume reference sheet with precise rectangular panels and disciplined spacing.

STYLE AVOID:
Avoid anime line art, cel shading, oil painting, 3D render, Unreal Engine look, western armor, modern fashion.

_meta.title: STYLE SWITCH BOOLEAN: false=ANIME WUXIA, true=REALISTIC WUXIA
